svg.title: KARA Q3 2025: LockBit 5.0, Akira, INC Ransomware Defense

g.text: Top 3 groups · 47% of all observed Q3 attacks
LockBit returns post-takedown · INC Ransomware emerges
Akira ESXi targeting · double extortion standard
RaaS affiliate pool grew · 2,300+ active operators
62 new TTPs documented · MITRE ATT&CK mapped
Initial access via Citrix Bleed 2 · ESXi mass-encrypt
YARA signatures · Lazarus binary clusters identified
Immutable backup · air-gapped · WORM storage tier
Incident response · 72hr SLA · cyber insurance coord
